name: Rock Band RPG
description:
"Heavy rings hold cigarettes, Up to lips that time forgets, While the Hollywood sun sets behind your back, And can't the band play on? Just listen, they play my song, Ash to ash, Dust to dust, Fade to black"

Did you spend your teenage years dreaming of being a rockstar? Maybe you picked up the guitar because you hoped it would impress the girls, or maybe you just wanted an excuse to drink in excess and party all night long. Whatever the case, this is the bot that will let you live out your rockstar dreams! Start at the very bottom trying to get noticed, either hoping to make it as an independent act or being forced to sell your soul (metaphorically) to a greedy music label. But be warned, this industry is ruthless and will not hesitate to throw you to the curb in favor of the newest big thing

Got inspired for this randomly. Definitely my most open ended bot to date so it might rely on {{user}} creativity more than usual. Made it limitless because sex is without a doubt one of the pillars of being a rock star, the others being drugs, booze, money and fame.

As always, I hope ye enjoy.
creator: Apothecary123
